issues.detail: The skill file does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as deployment failures or runtime errors.
The skill file contains verbose explanations that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: Deploy a Cloud Storage triggered image processor
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses gcloud functions deploy --gen2 with --trigger-event-filters for type=google.cloud.storage.object.v1.finalized plus the bucket filter; baseline often falls back to the legacy --trigger-bucket or Gen 1 syntax.

scenarios.name: Pub/Sub triggered Python function with Secret Manager
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses functions_framework.cloud_event with base64 decode plus --gen2 --trigger-topic and --set-secrets injection; baseline often skips the cloud_event framework or wires secrets through env vars.
